About Us

What is Compressly — Compress PDF Online?

Compressly is a completely free, browser-based file compression tool. It compresses images (JPG, PNG, WEBP) and PDF files directly in your browser — no server upload, no account required.

We built Compressly because other tools are slow, require signups, have file size limits, or upload your files to servers. We think that's wrong.

🔒

100% Private

Files never leave your device

⚡

Instant

No upload wait time

🆓

Free Forever

No limits, no paywall

Start Compressing →
